steps.title: Follow the contrast
steps.content: The sentence says none of the countries had more than 2 women on their high courts in 1980. The blank follows "but," so it should show that by 2010 the countries exceeded that earlier number.

steps.title: Choose matching data
steps.content: B discusses reductions over time, C compares increases, and D covers only Mexico. The choice saying Peru, the Philippines, and Mexico each had 3 women in 2010 directly completes the contrast with 1980. The answer is A.
